title: cyclopogon luteoalbus
intro: Cyclopogon luteoalbus, also known as the Yellow Albus Cyclopogon, is a species of plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various digestive issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its anti-inflammatory and anti-spasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cyclopogon luteoalbus is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
